pageContext.name: Stitch
pageContext.description: Super7's latest wave of Disney ULTIMATES! presented by Sideshow has a little something for everyone! With Ben AliGator from Disney's Fantasia, Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch, Disney Silly Symphony's The Big Bad Wolf, and The Queen of Hearts from Disney's Alice in Wonderland, there's an ULTIMATES! figure for fans of vintage shorts, animated classics, and beloved modern movies! These 7' scale highly-articulated, made-to-order figures come with interchangeable parts and additional must-have accessories, making them the ultimate collectible for any Disney fan!  He may be more United Galactic Federation fugitive than shelter dog, but Lilo knows that whatever he is, Stitch is good. This 7 scale ULTIMATES! figure of Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch includes multiple interchangeable heads & hands as well as a variety of accessories suitable for Experiment 626's zany hijinks! No one gets left behind in this family, so don't forget to make the made-to-order Disney ULTIMATES! figure of Stitch part of your Ohana before Captain Gantu tries to take him away!
